videos.headline: Blake Horvath punches in a Navy TD on the opening drive
videos.description: Blake Horvath keeps it and runs in a 5-yard touchdown for Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath punches in a Navy TD on the opening drive ) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cale Hellums evens the score with an Army TD
videos.description: Cale Hellums keeps it and forces his way through the defense to score a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cale Hellums evens the score with an Army TD) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath connects with Eli Heidenreich as Navy goes back on top
videos.description: Blake Horvath finds Eli Heidenreich for a touchdown to give Navy a lead late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath connects with Eli Heidenreich as Navy goes back on top) 2025/12/13 ESHEET
